'''âng-sh-f''' ('''kangashaf''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:ultimate|ultimate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-sh-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ultimate|ultimate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âng-sh-f
|-
! Lemma
| kangashaf
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thingashaf|thingashaf]] || [[word:jingashaf|jingashaf]] || [[word:shingashaf|shingashaf]] || [[word:kingashaf|kingashaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthungashaf|thuthungashaf]] || [[word:jujungashaf|jujungashaf]] || [[word:shushungashaf|shushungashaf]] || [[word:kukungashaf|kukungashaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thungashaf|thungashaf]] || [[word:jungashaf|jungashaf]] || [[word:shungashaf|shungashaf]] || [[word:kungashaf|kungashaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thungashaf|thungashaf]] || [[word:jungashaf|jungashaf]] || [[word:shungashaf|shungashaf]] || [[word:kungashaf|kungashaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thengashaf|thengashaf]] || [[word:jengashaf|jengashaf]] || [[word:shengashaf|shengashaf]] || [[word:kengashaf|kengashaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothongashaf|thothongashaf]] || [[word:jojongashaf|jojongashaf]] || [[word:shoshongashaf|shoshongashaf]] || [[word:kokongashaf|kokongashaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thongashaf|thongashaf]] || [[word:jongashaf|jongashaf]] || [[word:shongashaf|shongashaf]] || [[word:kongashaf|kongashaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thongashaf|thongashaf]] || [[word:jongashaf|jongashaf]] || [[word:shongashaf|shongashaf]] || [[word:kongashaf|kongashaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠngashaf|thĂŠngashaf]] || [[word:jĂŠngashaf|jĂŠngashaf]] || [[word:shĂŠngashaf|shĂŠngashaf]] || [[word:kĂŠngashaf|kĂŠngashaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathangashaf|thathangashaf]] || [[word:jajangashaf|jajangashaf]] || [[word:shashangashaf|shashangashaf]] || [[word:kakangashaf|kakangashaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thangashaf|thangashaf]] || [[word:jangashaf|jangashaf]] || [[word:shangashaf|shangashaf]] || [[word:kangashaf|kangashaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thangashaf|thangashaf]] || [[word:jangashaf|jangashaf]] || [[word:shangashaf|shangashaf]] || [[word:kangashaf|kangashaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shangashaf|shangashaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshangashaf|goshangashaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishangashaf|gokishangashaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shangashafnĂŒ|shangashafnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshangashafnknĂŒ|goshangashafnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishangashafnĂŒ|gokishangashafnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shangashafshĂ«|shangashafshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshangashafnkshĂ«|goshangashafnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishangashafshĂ«|gokishangashafshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangashafro|shangashafro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangashafnkro|goshangashafnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangashafro|gokishangashafro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shangashafmu|shangashafmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangashafnkmu|goshangashafnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangashafmu|gokishangashafmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shangashafsher|shangashafsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshangashafnksher|goshangashafnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishangashafsher|gokishangashafsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shangashafng|shangashafng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshangashafnkng|goshangashafnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishangashafng|gokishangashafng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shangashafya|shangashafya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshangashafnkya|goshangashafnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishangashafya|gokishangashafya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shangashafyam|shangashafyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshangashafnkyam|goshangashafnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishangashafyam|gokishangashafyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangashafnĂŒshĂ«|shangashafnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangashafnknĂŒshĂ«|goshangashafnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangashafnĂŒshĂ«|gokishangashafnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangashafnĂŒro|shangashafnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangashafnknĂŒro|goshangashafnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangashafnĂŒro|gokishangashafnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangashafnĂŒmu|shangashafnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangashafnknĂŒmu|goshangashafnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangashafnĂŒmu|gokishangashafnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangashafshĂ«nĂŒ|shangashafshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangashafnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshangashafnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangashafshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishangashafshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangashafshĂ«ro|shangashafshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangashafnkshĂ«ro|goshangashafnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangashafshĂ«ro|gokishangashafshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangashafshĂ«mu|shangashafshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangashafnkshĂ«mu|goshangashafnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangashafshĂ«mu|gokishangashafshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangashafronĂŒ|shangashafronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangashafnkronĂŒ|goshangashafnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangashafronĂŒ|gokishangashafronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangashafroshĂ«|shangashafroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangashafnkroshĂ«|goshangashafnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangashafroshĂ«|gokishangashafroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangashafromu|shangashafromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangashafnkromu|goshangashafnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangashafromu|gokishangashafromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangashafmunĂŒ|shangashafmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangashafnkmunĂŒ|goshangashafnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangashafmunĂŒ|gokishangashafmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangashafmushĂ«|shangashafmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangashafnkmushĂ«|goshangashafnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangashafmushĂ«|gokishangashafmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangashafmuro|shangashafmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangashafnkmuro|goshangashafnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangashafmuro|gokishangashafmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
